meaning: n.船库,艇库(原为储藏小舟的屋,亦有供人小憩处)
examples: The path serves as an approach to the boathouse.
I gestured toward the boathouse, and he looked inside.
I gestured towards the boathouse, and he looked inside.
The council said the scout hut and canoe club boathouse will stay at the park site.
The property has a main house, a two-bedroom guest cottage, a boathouse, and an octagonal office building.
